comment: CEX root MCP config (BORIS_MERGE A6). Union of previous .mcp-n0X.json files. Per-nucleus overlays remain in .mcp-n0X.json and win when a boot wrapper points --mcp-config at them.

firecrawl._setup: Optional. Set FIRECRAWL_API_KEY in .env and change disabled to false.

notebooklm._setup: Optional. Requires Chrome CDP session. Run boot/chrome_cdp.ps1 first.

postgres._setup: Optional. Pass connection string as last arg. Set disabled to false when ready.

canva._setup: Optional. Set CANVA_CLIENT_ID + CANVA_CLIENT_SECRET in .env. Change disabled to false.

playwright._setup: Run boot/chrome_cdp.ps1 first, then set disabled to false.
